item_specifications.special_feature: Built-In Door, Collapsible, Durable, Lightweight, Outdoor Safe

about_item: TRAVEL PET CRATE: Perfect for on-the-go pet parents, this hard-sided kennel is ideal for home, car travel, and outdoor adventures. Not approved for airline travel, but great for road trips, vet visits, or temporary containment of small, kennel-trained pets.

COLLAPSIBLE & LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Folds flat in seconds for effortless storage and portability. A built-in carrying handle makes transport a breeze, while the lightweight construction offers ease without sacrificing durability.

DOG CARRIER FEATURES: Durable twist-lock metal gate keeps your pet secure. Side ventilation slots provide airflow and visibility for comfort and peace of mind during travel. Designed for both indoor and outdoor use.
KENNEL SIZING: Designed for small dogs, puppies, cats, kittens, and other small animals. Measures 19.62"L x 13.5"W x 12"H — ideal for kennel-trained pets that need a cozy, secure space.

FIND YOUR PET SIZE: This XS travel pet kennel fits an animal maximum 10" tall x 18" long, up to 20lbs. For a comfortable fit for your pet, measure the height of your pet from floor to top of ears, in their most straight upright sitting or standing position, to capture their maximum height. Ensure their height does not exceed 10". Additionally, measure your pet's length, tip of nose to their rump, excluding their tail, ensuring this length also does not exceed the maximum 18" length. Size up your kennel if needed to ensure your animal has plenty of space to sit up, stand, and turn around with ease.

features.title: Easy Storage
features.text: This durable pet kennel securely contains your medium animal, cat or dog, while also folding flat quickly for easy storage.

features.title: Collapsible Pet Kennel
features.text: When you think of a typical plastic pet kennel, the things that probably come to mind, include big, bulky, clunky, heavy, hard to store, etc. That's not so when it comes to the Sport Pet Medium Collapsible Pet Kennel!

features.title: Easy Traveling
features.text: The kennel is intended for indoor or outdoor use with kennel trained pets up to 50 lbs. The Sport Pet Medium Collapsible Pet Kennel reimagines traveling with your pet!

summary.text: Customers find the pet carrier easy to assemble and appreciate its portability, being compact when folded and easy to carry with the top handle. The kennel receives positive feedback for its size, being perfect for medium-sized breeds and roomy enough for beagles, while customers like its design and stability, with one mentioning the door locks/unlocks easily. However, the sturdiness and durability receive mixed reviews - while some find it sturdy and durable for day-to-day use, others report issues with the door breaking off and the carrier breaking within months of use.

authors_reviews.title: Collapsible kennel
authors_reviews.text: Love this product. Perfect size and easy to put up and fold back down and store in the house and the car. I was worried the dog would destroy it because it was light but it is sturdy enough that my 6 yr old pitbull did no damage to it. I’m using it for my 2 month old husky now. Worked wonderfully for both dogs in size. My puppy sleeps wonderfully in the kennel. I’m very happy with it and will buy two more as they are great for travelling and fit into tight spaces if need be.
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Outstanding Quality Kennel – Just a Bit Too Small for My Dog
authors_reviews.text: I recently purchased the SportPet plastic kennel, and although I ultimately had to return it because my dog was just a little too big, I was thoroughly impressed with its quality. Here’s why I’m giving it five stars:**Exceptional Quality:** The build of this kennel is top-notch. The plastic is thick and sturdy, and it feels incredibly durable. I have no doubt it would stand up to years of use.**Easy Assembly:** Putting the kennel together was a breeze. The instructions were clear, and all the parts fit together seamlessly. It took me less than 5 minutes to assemble it, which was a pleasant surprise.**Great Design:** The design of the kennel is well thought out. It has plenty of ventilation, which is essential for keeping my pet comfortable. The door latch is secure and easy to use, providing peace of mind that my dog would be safe and secure inside.**Portable and Practical:** The kennel is lightweight and has built-in handles, making it easy to move around. It’s also airline-approved, which would be fantastic for traveling with a pet.**Perfect for Medium Dogs:** Although it turned out to be just a bit too small for my dog, I can see that it would be perfect for medium-sized breeds. The dimensions are accurate as described, so make sure to measure your pet before purchasing.**Customer Service:** The return process was smooth and hassle-free. The customer service team was helpful and understanding, which I greatly appreciated.In summary, the SportPet plastic kennel is an excellent product with outstanding quality and thoughtful design. I highly recommend it for anyone with a medium-sized dog. Even though it didn’t work out for my pup, I’m still very impressed and would consider other products from this brand. Five stars for sure!---I hope this review captures everything you wanted to convey! If you need any adjustments or additional details, please let me know.
authors_reviews.author: Ryan Marshall

authors_reviews.title: Great crate for travel with small pet
authors_reviews.text: Purchased this crate for a short road trip & long weekend vacay stay with our guinea pig. This crate worked perfectly! We were able to fit all of his essentials and he still had PLENTY of room to move around & move on/off the top of his hide-house. Very impressed with the stability of this collapsible crate. Easy to set up and collapse. Easy to clean. Very happy with this product.
authors_reviews.author: April Heavey

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for its use
authors_reviews.text: This kennel was instrumental in me being able to provide care for my mother. It is pretty sturdy and easily broken down and set back up.. perfect size description.
authors_reviews.author: Onecentholt

authors_reviews.title: Cute and great collapsible quality pet crate
authors_reviews.text: This pet crate is very worth the price! It is a really good size for our baby puppy and she’s a teddy bear she is supposed to grow between 8-13 lbs and she is currently 6.5 lb, she loves to take lots of naps during the day and sleeps mostly throughout the night. It was very hard at first but thankgoodness she finally had adjusted it only takes practice! The quality of the crate is so great and it’s got very nice color even the way it’s designed. The fact that it’s collapsible and easy to carry! It has lots of room for a small puppy like her!
authors_reviews.author: ℳ𝒶𝓇𝓎𝒶𝓂 𝒮𝒶𝒷𝒶𝓈

authors_reviews.title: Dangerous door lock.
authors_reviews.text: The open and close mechanism on the inside of the crate injured our puppy. The puppy got his mouth caught in the part that sticks out. Very badly designed. Cheaply made.
authors_reviews.author: daisydog

authors_reviews.title: Perfect transportation for our 2 - 20lb Cavaliers....
authors_reviews.text: We have 2 smaller pups. We love taking them with us everywhere we go. We wanted something extremely strong, yet lightweight. This is the best for us. The door on it opens and locks easily. We put a soft cushion rug in the bottom. At first glance it looks as though they cannot see out of the slats, but they really can. Easy to handle. It is perfect for them to ride in. We had to rig our own secured strap to hold it in place in our SUV, but it does not slide at all. We put a sturdy hefty moving blanket pad under it to not ruin the car carpet. It is perfect for our family. We chose the light neutral color.
authors_reviews.author: Liz

authors_reviews.title: Portable crate
authors_reviews.text: Sturdy portable crate. My puppy is 5 mo old and it will accomodate him into adulthood. He is a male cocker. I use the crate when i leave the house until he is fully housebroken and i can trust him to have access to the whole house!
authors_reviews.author: Lila Moses

other_countries_reviews.title: Does the job
other_countries_reviews.text: Odd that the handle is on top opposed to the side but other than that super great, easy to set up, light, compact and secure. Would pick over a wire crate any day.
other_countries_reviews.author: Melissa
